MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Plaintiff JOHN FOWLKES present.
Atty. LUKAS SOSNICKI, Esq. of Thompson Coburn LLP (tel: 310-282-2500) seeking to be relieved as counsel.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JOHN FOWLKES.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion, the Court grants counsel's motion for withdrawal.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
